title: Shroff Eye Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shroff Eye Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!
